author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Merge pull request #115 from RajashekarRaju/ktlint-localization

V0.5.0-Implement String Localization and Hardcoded String Detection

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message: Update UiStateHandler.kt

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message: Merge branch 'development' into ktlint-localization

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Replace hardcoded strings with string resources

Refactored UI components to use stringResource for user-facing text, improving localization support. Added new string resources for error messages and feature announcements. Updated the NoHardcodedStringsRule to refine technical string detection.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Replace hardcoded 'Dismiss' with string resource

Updated the ShowAlertDialog component to use a string resource for the 'Dismiss' button instead of a hardcoded value. Added the 'dismiss' string to strings.xml. Improved NoHardcodedStringsRule to better detect technical strings and domain/date patterns. Registered custom Ktlint ruleset provider.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Remove unused sample_email string and hardcode preview email

Replaces the use of the sample_email string resource with a hardcoded email in the SignUpScreen preview and removes the unused sample_email entry from strings.xml.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Refactor to avoid hardcoded email in sign-up preview

Replaces the hardcoded email in SignUpScreenAwaitingConfirmationStepPreview with a string resource. Adds 'sample_email' to strings.xml and improves template string detection in NoHardcodedStringsRule for better linting of hardcoded strings.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Clean up project files and improve NoHardcodedStringsRule

Removed .idea configuration files and updated .gitignore to exclude .idea and .kotlin directories. Enhanced the NoHardcodedStringsRule to better detect hardcoded strings in both functions and properties, including improved handling of template strings and property declarations. Also removed unnecessary test dependencies from ktlint-rules/build.gradle.kts and fixed a typo in the README.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Add custom ktlint rule for hardcoded strings in Compose

Introduces a new :ktlint-rules module with a custom rule to detect hardcoded user-visible strings in @Composable functions, replacing the previous test-based approach. Updates .gitignore for new build outputs and removes obsolete IntelliJ project files. Integrates the new rule set into the app module and updates settings.gradle.kts to include the new module.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message: Update HardcodedStringTest.kt

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Localize hardcoded strings in UI components

Replaced hardcoded UI strings with string resources across multiple screens to improve localization support. Added new string resources for tab titles, category labels, error messages, and content descriptions.

author: Cicero Hellmann Jacobi
message:
Add test to detect hardcoded strings in Composables

Introduces HardcodedStringTest to scan Kotlin source files for hardcoded user-visible strings within @Composable functions, excluding preview and technical strings. This helps enforce best practices for string localization and maintainability.
